description_long: This is a dark, robust helmet with a full-face design, featuring two large, upward-curving white horns attached symmetrically on either side of the dome. The helmet's face opening is angular, with pronounced cheek guards and a pointed nose guard, providing both protection and an intimidating appearance. The surface of the helmet is matte and slightly rough, suggesting a forged or cast metal construction. The rear of the helmet is rounded and solid, with no visible openings or attachments. The horns are smooth and sharply tapered, contrasting with the helmet's darker, textured body. There are no visible logos, graphics, or ventilation features, giving the helmet a utilitarian and somewhat medieval or fantasy-inspired look.
description: A dark, full-face helmet with large, white, upward-curving horns and an angular, protective design. The surface is matte and textured, with no visible graphics or ventilation.
description_view_0: Front view shows the angular face opening, pointed nose guard, and both large white horns prominently.
description_view_1: Front-left angle highlights the left horn's attachment and the helmet's cheek guard profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the rounded back of the helmet and the symmetrical placement of the horns.
description_view_3: Front-right angle emphasizes the right horn and the helmet's side structure.
